remarks: Ultra convenient location near Connecticut Ave, a short drive to beaches, SoNo Nightlife, great restaurants, the Maritime Center, close to ALL daily conveniences and I95. This one-level unit is on the ground floor has a dedicated parking space and plenty of street parking for guests. At the front door, you are greeted by a lovely front garden. There are large picture windows in both the living room and bedroom bringing in lots of natural light. The condo comes with a large lower level storage room, not often found in this market. Just downstairs from their unit, there is a large laundry room with plenty of washers and dryers. There is a small assessment of approximately $30 coming for a new retaining wall and beautification of the building so the new owner will benefit from these new upgrades! This condo has been professionally deep cleaned and the carpets are being steam cleaned Monday June 29. Ready for the next owner!
